title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入塞内加尔：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入塞內加爾：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Senegal ASN standards acceptance, CRSE / Senelec electricity-sector project review, fire-safety, 50 Hz grid, IEC 62619 / IEC 62933, and UN 38.3 transport expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与塞内加尔ASN标准接受、CRSE / Senelec电力项目审查、消防安全、50Hz电网、IEC 62619 / IEC 62933及UN 38.3运输要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與塞內加爾ASN標準接受、CRSE / Senelec電力項目審查、消防安全、50Hz電網、IEC 62619 / IEC 62933及UN 38.3運輸要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, ASN scope determination, CRSE authorization, Senelec interconnection approval, fire-safety approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, EPC contractors, and project owners should verify current Senegal standards, electricity-sector, grid, fire, transport, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、ASN适用范围裁定、CRSE授权、Senelec并网批准、消防安全批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方、EPC承包商和项目业主在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行塞内加尔标准、电力行业、电网、消防、运输及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、ASN適用範圍裁定、CRSE授權、Senelec併網批准、消防安全批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方、EPC承包商和項目業主在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行塞內加爾標準、電力行業、電網、消防、運輸及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For BESS exported from China to Senegal, the public sources reviewed did not identify a single Senegal product certificate dedicated to stationary lithium BESS. The practical gap is usually project-level: ASN or customer acceptance of IEC 62619 / IEC 62933 evidence, CRSE / Senelec electricity-sector and interconnection review for storage projects, local fire-safety review, 50 Hz site settings, and UN 38.3 transport evidence. China GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are useful baselines but are not Senegal approvals by themselves.
answer_first.zh: 中国BESS出口塞内加尔时，已审阅的公开来源未识别到专门针对固定式锂电BESS的单一塞内加尔产品证书。实际差距通常在项目层面：ASN或客户对IEC 62619 / IEC 62933证据的接受，CRSE / Senelec对储能项目的电力行业和并网审查，当地消防安全审查，50Hz场址整定，以及UN 38.3运输证据。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023是有用基线，但其本身不是塞内加尔批准。
answer_first.zht: 中國BESS出口塞內加爾時，已審閱的公開來源未識別到專門針對固定式鋰電BESS的單一塞內加爾產品證書。實際差距通常在項目層面：ASN或客戶對IEC 62619 / IEC 62933證據的接受，CRSE / Senelec對儲能項目的電力行業和併網審查，當地消防安全審查，50Hz場址整定，以及UN 38.3運輸證據。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023是有用基線，但其本身不是塞內加爾批准。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, fire authority, grid operator, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
